day3_morning_start.name: Me
day3_morning_start.text: *Day 3. Last night's dream left me feeling unrested.*

day3_morning_mirror.name: Me
day3_morning_mirror.text: *I looked in the mirror. My complexion is off. ...When did I start looking like this?*

day3_morning_2.name: Me
day3_morning_2.text: *I arrive at school. Sea isn't waiting today. ...Somehow that bothers me more than it should.*

day3_morning_2b.name: Me
day3_morning_2b.text: *Yesterday she was here ten minutes early. What's different today?*

day3_morning_hallway.name: Me
day3_morning_hallway.text: *Walking down the corridor, I stop in front of the shoe lockers. Something caught my eye.*

day3_morning_locker.name: Me
day3_morning_locker.text: *One locker has a name scratched off. Only traces remain... like someone deliberately erased it.*

day3_morning_locker_2.name: Me
day3_morning_locker_2.text: *I cracked the locker open. Empty inside. But in the corner, something... A photo fragment? A passport-sized photo, cut in half.*

day3_morning_locker_3.name: Me
day3_morning_locker_3.text: *...What is this? I pocket it. I'll look closer later.*

day3_morning_seolhwa_glimpse.name: Me
day3_morning_seolhwa_glimpse.text: *...Someone is standing at the end of the corridor. A pale face. Watching me.*

day3_morning_seolhwa_glimpse_2.name: Me
day3_morning_seolhwa_glimpse_2.text: *I blinked and she was gone. ...Seolhwa? Was that her just now?*

day3_morning_classroom.name: Me
day3_morning_classroom.text: *I step into the classroom. The atmosphere is off. The way people look at me is... different from yesterday.*

day3_morning_class_2.name: Me
day3_morning_class_2.text: *They were in the middle of some conversation that died the moment I walked in. What were they talking about?*

day3_morning_class_sea.name: Me
day3_morning_class_sea.text: *Sea is at her seat. Smiling like usual, but... something is different. Only her mouth is smiling.*

day3_morning_class_3.name: Park Eunsu
day3_morning_class_3.text: "{name}, you look tired today. Did you sleep well last night?"

day3_morning_class_4.name: Me
day3_morning_class_4.text: *...How does she know I didn't sleep well? Are my dark circles that obvious? Or... am I really being watched?*

day3_morning_desk.name: Me
day3_morning_desk.text: *I open my desk drawer... The pencil case I left here yesterday has been moved. Did someone go through my things?*

day3_morning_end.name: Me
day3_morning_end.text: *Class begins. I try to focus, but my head is a mess.*
